title: curculigo pilosa subsp. major
intro: Curculigo pilosa subsp. major, also known as the 'Tailor's Needle', is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Hypoxidaceae. It is native to Asia and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and enhancing immune system function. Curculigo pilosa subsp. major is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
